image.body: <g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path stroke-dasharray="66" stroke-width="2" d="M3 14v-9h18v14h-18v-5"><animate fill="freeze" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" dur="0.6s" values="66;0"/></path><path stroke-dasharray="26" stroke-dashoffset="26" d="M3 16l4 -3l3 2l6 -5l5 4"><animate fill="freeze" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" begin="0.6s" dur="0.4s" to="0"/></path></g><circle cx="7.5" cy="9.5" r="1.5" fill="currentColor" opacity="0"><animate fill="freeze" attributeName="opacity" begin="1s" dur="0.2s" to="1"/></circle>
